abilities.name: Demise
abilities.description: Falls unconscious = killed. On death, all within p2 suffer 2 damage + Water effect.

abilities.name: Splish Splosh
abilities.description: Immune to Burning Condition and Fire Immuto Spells/Powers.

abilities.name: Liquid Form (Water)
abilities.description: Can pass through any opening large enough for drop of water (passive).

abilities.name: Water Immuto Demise
abilities.description: On death, damaged characters end Burning Condition.

actions: (1) Claw (Pugilism) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.
(1) Elemental Blast (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: z8 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.
system.notes: Small elemental Water construct summoned by spellcasters. Immune Burning. Can pass through cracks like water. On death ends Burning.
